opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My lower back is in absolute agony and I can't catch my breath. I've also had this huge hard lump in my ball for months that I've been too scared and ashamed to tell anyone about, and now I feel like I'm falling apart.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The back pain came on badly tonight and I suddenly can't breathe properly — I've been putting off dealing with the lump for ages but tonight everything feels really wrong.

symptom_narrative.onset: the hard lump has been there and slowly getting heavier for over eight months; the severe back pain and the breathlessness both came on suddenly tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: lump: 8+ months; back pain and breathlessness: a few hours, since this evening
symptom_narrative.character: the lump is hard and heavy and doesn't hurt; the back pain is deep, constant and unbearable; the breathing feels like I can't fill my lungs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the back pain is the worst I've ever had and the breathlessness is frightening
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: lump in one testicle and a dragging heaviness low in my belly; pain across my lower back; breathlessness in my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the lump crept up over months; the back pain and breathlessness are constant since they started tonight and not easing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps, I can't get comfortable
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving and lying flat make the back pain and breathing worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've lost a huge amount of weight without trying over the last few months, I've had a cough that won't go away, and my chest/breast area has been tender and a bit swollen
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this back pain or breathlessness before; the lump has just been slowly there
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't get out of bed tonight because of the pain and I get breathless with any effort

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a hard, painless lump in one testicle that I have known about for over eight months and avoided seeing anyone about
past_medical_history.how_managed: not managed at all — I avoided all doctors out of fear and shame

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and has become very isolated; describes a lot of fear and shame that stopped him seeking help; has avoided all medical contact

reluctance_topics: the testicular lump, out of shame and fear

objective_data_offered.value: he says he has lost a lot of weight and his clothes are hanging off him, and he looks very unwell and drained
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-description, not a clinician assessment

objective_data_offered.value: he says he cannot catch his breath and feels breathless even lying still
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective self-report of breathlessness; no measured oxygen level available

objective_data_offered.value: he can feel a hard, heavy lump in one testicle that he says has been there for months
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-palpation; cannot be examined or characterised remotely
